title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **The Legacy Of Mars**
*2027*
Discover new planets to terraform, and new ways to do it!
![The Legacy Of Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_7059127e.jpg)

2. **First Giants**
*2026*
Dinosaurs, flying reptiles & giant mammals — create the most prestigious exhibition!
![First Giants](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_21940c4b.png)

3. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_b06026a7.png)

4. **Toy Battle**
*2025*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_5270d9ac.jpg)

5. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_9b82c517.png)

6. **Dungeons of the Oak Dell**
*2025*
Innovative fighting system, letting you immerse in every hit you deal to a monster!
![Dungeons of the Oak Dell](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_602a23e0.jpg)

7. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_33437a1f.jpg)

8. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_2f8a3dbc.jpg)

9. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_103a5ab5.jpg)

10. **Emberleaf**
*2025*
Rally heroes, reclaim the forest, and restore the Emberlings' sacred homeland.
![Emberleaf](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_a66d8490.jpg)

11. **Vantage**
*2025*
Explore an entire planet's open world from a first-person perspective.
![Vantage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_47890abd.jpg)

12. **Dragons Down**
*2024*
Explore a fantasy sandbox world inspired by Magic Realm seeking fame and fortune.
![Dragons Down](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_5a0fa5ee.jpg)

13. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_5613a93d.jpg)

14. **Feya's Swamp**
*2025*
Rise as the most prosperous clan in this magical swamp.
![Feya's Swamp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_831f6196.png)

15. **Terraria: The Board Game**
*2026*
Dig, fight, explore and build in this co-op adventure for 1-4 intrepid Terrarians!
![Terraria: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_6c7f7b3d.jpg)

16. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_e2f5a95a.png)

17. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_ac2b7666.png)

18. **The Old Prince 1871**
*2022*
Entanglement, forced compromises & variously (un)welcome "friends".
![The Old Prince 1871](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_a8aeb0b7.jpg)

19. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_f3eb9597.jpg)

20. **Hot Streak**
*2025*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_700a310f.jpg)

21. **Habitats**
*2016*
Build a wildlife park - but be sure to give your animals the terrain they need!
![Habitats](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_627faac7.jpg)

22. **Dirt & Dust**
*2025*
Rally in the world of dice and cards.
![Dirt & Dust](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_6383670f.jpg)

23. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_405195c9.jpg)

24. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_3090b010.jpg)

25. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_1d750087.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*16 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_24248da4.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*24 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_492594bf.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*52 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_2e687d61.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*19 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_663fce40.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*88 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_3c4a0439.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*12 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_64cf6f85.png)

7. **Azul**
*102 months on the list*

Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*34 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_8ad133e4.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*31 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_ec7f4fc2.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*57 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_8a61f578.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*3 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_e1e9ce64.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*24 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_38f496a3.png)

15. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*17 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_a7ee991b.jpg)

16. **Sky Team**
*31 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_2ccd052c.jpg)

17. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*64 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_d65618f2.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*10 months on the list*

![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_ddcc8e5b.jpg)

19. **Brass: Birmingham**
*17 months on the list*

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*10 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.

*3 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_a9f35116.png)

22. **Carcassonne**
*274 months on the list*

23. **The White Castle**
*30 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_98162935.jpg)

24. **SCOUT**
*41 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_16b4758b.png)

25. **Splendor**
*144 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-18/toplist/bgg_4d53a091.jpg)
